meaning: n.采自墨西哥蘑菇的一种迷幻药
examples: The group is now trying to conduct a clinical trial to test psilocybin as a treatment.
Forbes has learned that in March 1997, Ceglia pled guilty to felony possession of a controlled substance called psilocybin.
Earlier research at Imperial College London showed that injections of psilocybin could calm a region of the brain which is overactive in depression.
